headline: Frame Your Future 2026: Public Speaker Series Elevates the Conversation on Innovation, Education, and the Evolving World of Work
summary: This spring, Columbia University's School of Professional Studies (Columbia SPS) will host a public thought leadership event program that highlights the value of strategically investing in one's own professional education in order to succeed in today's volatile organizational environment. headline: Big Tech H-1B Filings Plunge As Amazon, Google, Meta And Microsoft Slash Jobs Amid Rising Immigration Costs
summary: H-1B visa applications at major tech companies fell sharply in late 2025 as layoffs rose and stricter U.S. immigration rules increased costs and scrutiny. Big Tech H-1B Applications Drop Federal data shows Amazon.com Inc.), Alphabet Inc.'s Google, Meta Platforms, Inc., and Microsoft Corp filed significantly fewer H-1B petitions in the first quarter of fiscal 2026, as reported by Business Insider on Wednesday. headline: Arm’s AI Chip Pivot With Meta And IBM Faces Rich Valuation Risks
summary: Arm Holdings (NasdaqGS:ARM) is moving from a pure licensing model into in-house AI chip production. The company has launched a new AGI CPU developed with Meta for advanced AI workloads. Arm announced a collaboration with Meta and a separate partnership with IBM focused on enterprise AI infrastructure. These steps signal a push into the AI data center market and more direct competition with established chipmakers. Arm has long supplied chip designs that power a wide range of smartphones and...

headline: CrowdStrike Partnerships And AI Products Deepen Falcon Platform Consolidation Story
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) has rolled out a series of AI-focused product launches, including Falcon Data Security, Agentic MDR, and the Charlotte AI AgentWorks Ecosystem. The company has expanded its collaborations with IBM, Intel, and HCLTech to tighten integration between its Falcon platform, partner AI tools, and hardware. These moves deepen CrowdStrike's approach to AI driven cybersecurity, with new features such as adversary informed cloud protection, agentic SOAR, and no code...
